relations.subject: Udzungwa forest partridge
relations.evidence: Nyumbanitu Forest is separated from Ndundulu-Luhombero by 5 km of grassland habitat
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Udzungwa forest partridge
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size, limited range and overhunting in some areas, the Udzungwa forest partridge is classified as Endangered on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Udzungwa forest partridge

relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
